base_prompt_en: Create one 3D-ready educational biological model of {object}, centered on a clean white background. Use a three-quarter open cutaway view, not a flat diagram. The model must have a thick visible cut rim, one continuous outer silhouette, readable front-side depth, and clearly exposed internal structures arranged with generous spacing. Use semi-matte opaque teaching-model materials, low specular highlights, soft studio shadows, and natural color separation. Make the surface slightly textured but not glossy, glassy, transparent, jelly-like, translucent, wet, metallic, or toy-plastic. Keep only the major structures needed for recognition, with clear large forms and low-frequency geometry suitable for image-to-3D reconstruction.
negative_prompt_en: Do not create transparent jelly, glass, wet plastic, glossy toy material, labels, arrows, text, UI marks, multiple views in one image, collage, four panels, infographic layout, flat front-only diagram, dense tiny particles, noisy micro-texture, floating parts, background scenery, decorative lighting, or crowded organelles touching each other.

细菌.addon_en: open side cutaway, thick layered cell envelope, one coherent blue nucleoid mass, sparse short pili, no dense hair, no wet jelly, no floating fragments

线粒体.addon_en: one large cut window, thick matte orange outer membrane, broad raised cristae folds, high contrast inner folds, no tiny repeated wrinkles, no glossy shell

叶绿体.addon_en: open cutaway, separated stacks of thylakoid discs, matte green membrane, clear disc spacing, no transparent gel shell, no watery material

植物细胞.addon_en: thick cell wall, large vacuole, nucleus, three or four chloroplasts, one or two mitochondria, wide spacing, no dense vesicles, no crowded organelles

动物细胞.addon_en: nucleus, endoplasmic reticulum, Golgi apparatus, two mitochondria, clear membrane rim, wide spacing, no crowded organelle field

细胞膜.object_en: short thick modular fluid mosaic cell membrane segment
细胞膜.addon_en: fewer phospholipid units, separated channel protein and glycoprotein modules, thick teaching model proportions, no endless bead array, no ultra-thin sheet

核糖体.addon_en: broad lumpy surfaces, one visible mRNA strand, reduced high-frequency bumps, no scientific atom-level detail, no dense holes

气孔.object_en: plant stoma with two guard cells
气孔.addon_en: open cutaway teaching model, two thick matte guard cells around a clear pore, simple surrounding epidermal surface, no labels, no transparent gel

病毒.addon_en: thick capsid shell, visible inner genome bundle, simplified spikes with generous spacing, matte opaque material, no dense spike forest, no transparent glass shell

quality_checklist: no transparent jelly or glossy plastic
